## Summary / 摘要

Describe the change in a few direct sentences.  
请用几句话直接说明这次改动做了什么。

## Change Type / 改动类型

- [ ] Documentation (文档)
- [ ] Hardware / CAD (硬件)
- [ ] Firmware / STM32 (固件)
- [ ] Software / Linux SBC (软件 / Linux 单板机)
- [ ] Vision / Control (视觉 / 控制)
- [ ] CI / Repository setup (仓库相关)

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

Link the related issue if one exists.  
如果有对应 issue，请在这里关联。

## Validation / 验证方式

Explain how you validated the change.  
说明你是如何验证这次改动的。

## Docs Updated? / 文档是否同步更新

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not needed

## Hardware Impact / 硬件影响

Note whether this changes mechanical, electrical, calibration, or assembly assumptions.  
说明这次改动是否影响机械、电气、标定或装配假设。
